summary: On 2022-10-05, there were 41 adverse event reports for atorvastatin, which is lower than the expected 95.65 reports, indicating a statistically anomalous drop in reports.
notable_pattern: The reports from 2022-10-02 show a mix of non-serious and serious adverse events, with some patients experiencing multiple symptoms. There is no clear pattern beyond the aggregate stats.
confidence_caveat: This is an exploratory signal from a limited sample of 8 reports and should not be considered a clinical conclusion.
